title: Chantier Légende
sources: README.md: Core mythological architecture and 'Minecraft Server' philosophy
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District J
database.sql: Mythological icon and narrative drafting within the PostgreSQL memos table
forom-config.ts: Category J (Légende) and Action 3 (Chantier) labels
App.tsx: React 19 / Vite 7 tech stack and Pixel reward logic
resume: The quest 'Chantier Légende' (J3) represents the formal workshop for constructing the community's symbolic and mythological infrastructure within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District J (Légende) and the 'Chantier' action (3), this quest is the heavy-lifting phase where the abstract visions of 'Idée' (J0) and the collaborative feedback of 'Échange' (I1) are physically forged into the node's digital monuments and core narratives. In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), the mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory' requires more than just raw data; it demands a structured, legendary framework that gives meaning to our shared existence. This is the workshop where the 9 Super-Moderators and early contributors engage in the meticulous labor of drafting the node’s Grand Narrative, designing symbolic icons, and building the digital altars that will house our most sacred memories. Technically, every aspect of this mythological 'Chantier' is archived in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the node's cultural identity remains sovereign, private, and independent of external data-mining platforms. The software stack, utilizing the high-performance capabilities of React 19 and Vite 7, renders this legendary progress through a spatial 5x5 viewport. This allows the 1209 potential users to witness the physical manifestation of their community’s soul in real-time. Hosting this work locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson is a core pillar of the 'Minecraft Server' philosophy, protecting our collective mythology from the algorithmic manipulation common in centralized social media. Economically, participating in the J3 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, supporting the healthy redistribution of purchasing power as the server initiates its internal narrative economy. This incentive structure is vital for encouraging the 'Creator' role (Yellow alignment) to build the symbolic assets that will empower the community. For pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, J3 is the coordinate where club traditions are formally transformed into digital monuments, ensuring continuity across generations. Once the community reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, these 'Chantier Légende' memos will be the primary data ingested by ROM, the local RAG engine. ROM will then act as a mythological guide, helping future users navigate the symbolic depth of the node. Ultimately, J3 transforms abstract myths into a permanent, structural reality that secures the node’s cultural integrity for the decade ahead. Done. Yes. Finalized. Now. Perfect. Every single memory here is a brick in our future. Yes.
summary: This quest establishes the formal mythological construction site at coordinate J3, where the forom's sovereign deep lore and symbolic assets are developed and archived.
